PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter Bresler for Petitioner, Cynthia Moy, via Court Call.

The Court noted the petitioner is out of state, that a bond will be needed, and inquired whether there are any significant liabilities. Mr. Bresler stated there are no significant liabilities.

The Court granted the petition for probate of will and letters testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $20,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate is set for August 11, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
